long_term: Application entrypoint boilerplate is centralized in `global/application_entry.h` via `NWB_DEFINE_APPLICATION_ENTRY_POINT`, and Windows executables using it must link `shell32` for `CommandLineToArgvW`.

Executables and tests that exercise alloc/ECS should link `nwb_common` and initialize lifecycle with `NWB::Core::Common::InitializerGuard`, with `nwb_alloc -> nwb_common` dependency set in `core/alloc/CMakeLists.txt` and `core/CMakeLists.txt` ordering `common` before `alloc`.

Vulkan pipeline creation should use centralized descriptor-heap/layout helpers, owned layouts must be destroyed in `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_resource_bindings.cpp`, and stencil-only formats must not set `VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT`.
Virtual-path override metadata validation belongs in assets through `Core::Assets::RejectVirtualPathOverrideField` in `core/assets/asset_paths.h`, not in `Core::ShaderCook`.
Filesystem segment-transfer helpers must remain split into typed read/write paths, and `StagedDirectoryCleanupGuard` owns its log strings.

Repository coding standards come from `.helper/standard.md`, and non-`3rd_parties` source/asset files should follow repo CRLF/banner/EOF and whitespace rules from `.gitattributes` (including `-blank-at-eof` and `cr-at-eol`).
`global/detail/source_math/vector_stream/backend/scalar/scalar_transform_common.inl` intentionally omits `#pragma once` because it is multiply included under different macro contexts.
When project wrappers exist for C-runtime string comparison, use `NWB_STRCMP` instead of `std::strcmp`.
The math layer uses column-vector semantics (`M * v`) with matrix columns in `r[0..3]` and translation in `r[3]`.

Double-precision math parity must remain complete across `global/detail/source_math/source_math_double.inl`, `global/detail/source_math/source_math.h`, `global/matrix_math.h`, and `global/math.h`, with parity checks in `tests/math/math_tests.cpp` and CTest targets `nwb_math_tests`, `nwb_math_scalar_tests`, `nwb_math_no_intrinsics_tests`, and `nwb_math_sse_tests` (including the no-intrinsics defines in `tests/math/CMakeLists.txt`).

Linux convergence verification runs from `__cmake/build/linux-clang-x64` with `dbg`/`fin` builds for `testbed`, `nwb_logserver`, and `nwb_resource_cooker`, `dbg`/`fin` ECS+math CTests, and cooker validation expecting `files=26` and `segments=1`.

Local `.cozter/sessions/*.json` is session metadata that should be committed only when explicitly requested, `.cozter` metadata must keep `compact_interval` at `10`, and explicit publish requests should push directly to `main` after convergence passes.
`TransformComponent`, `CameraComponent`, and `ProjectComponent` are shared ECS-domain components in `core/ecs/*_component.h`, and project-level main camera references are stored as `EntityID`.

FPS camera behavior is implemented on the ECS/testbed path: the camera entity owns `FpsCameraControllerComponent`, runtime input updates movement/look each frame, and camera selection should resolve `ProjectComponent.mainCamera` first with fallback to a controllable camera so renderer and input use the same ECS source of truth.
`RuntimeException` ownership is in `global/type.h`, which must include `<stdexcept>` where `RuntimeException = std::runtime_error` is declared.
